description_long: This object is a tall pillar candle set atop a robust, square-based holder. The candle itself is cylindrical, off-white in color, and features a visible flame at the top, indicating it is currently lit. The holder is constructed from a dark, metallic material with a wood-textured central shaft, reinforced by metal bands at the top and bottom. The base is wide and stable, designed to prevent tipping, and the top features a shallow, round metal plate to catch any dripping wax. The overall design is both decorative and functional, suitable for outdoor or urban environments where durability and stability are important. The combination of wood and metal gives it a rustic yet industrial aesthetic.
description: A tall, off-white pillar candle with a visible flame sits on a sturdy, dark metal and wood-textured holder with a wide square base. The design is both decorative and functional, blending rustic and industrial elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the candle and holder, with the flame clearly visible and the wood texture on the shaft prominent.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the metal banding and the round plate supporting the candle.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the cylindrical shape of the candle and the square base of the holder.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the wood grain texture and the robust construction of the holder.
